verses.text: Gentail mite in zong Pasian' thu a upna uh, Judea gamsunga om sawltakte leh thu um mite in a za uh hi
Tua ahih manin Jerusalem khua-ah Peter a pai ciangin Gentail mite zong vun a ki-at ding uh ahi hi, ci-in a ngaihsun mite in Peter mawhsak uh a
“Bang hangin vun a ki-atlo Gentail mite' inn-ah tung a, amaute tawh an nangawn nekhawm na hi hiam?” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih manin Peter in a thupiang khempeuh a patna panin a ban banin gen a
“Joppa khua-ah thungenin ka om laitakin maang ka mu hi. A peek deda khat a kiu li-ah khau kivawhin vantung panin hong kikhaisuk ka mu a, keima mai sanah hong khawl hi
Tua a peek deda tung, limtakin ka et ciangin ganhing, gamsa, a bokvak ganhing leh vasate ka mu hi
Tua ciangin awging khat in kei kiangah, ‘Peter aw, tho in la tuate go-in ne in,’ hong cihna ka za hi
Ahi zongin keimah in, ‘Topa aw, tuate go-in ka ne het kei ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh a ninin a kingaihsun an peuhmah ka kam ka tun' ngei kei hi,’ ka ci hi
Ahi zongin van panin a awging in, ‘Pasian in a siangin a gensa khat peuhpeuh a nin na ci kei ding hi,’ hong ci kik hi
Tu-a bangin a thumveina dong hong cih khit ciangin vantungah tua a peek deda kilato kik hi
Tua laitakin Sisaria khua panin kei kiangah a hong kisawl mihing thumte, ka zintun'na inn-ah hong tung uh hi

Lunghiang loin amaute ka zuihpahna dingin Kha Siangtho in kei tungah hong gen khinzo hi. Joppa khua panin hih i sanggam gukte in zong Sisaria khua-ah hong zui uh a, ka vekpi-un Kornelias inn-ah ka lut uh hi
Tua ciangin amah in vantung mi khat a inn sungah a ding mu-in, tua vantung mi in ama kiangah, ‘Simon Peter a kici mipa a sam dingin Joppa khua-ah mi sawl in
Amah in nang leh na innkuan khempeuh un hotkhiatna na ngahna ding uh thu hong gen ding hi,’ a cihna thu a hong gen hi
Tua thu gen dingin ka kipat laitakin eite in Kha Siangtho i ngah cil huna mah bangin amaute tungah Kha Siangtho hong tung hi
Tua ciangin Topa in, ‘Johan in tui sungah hong phum a, ahi zongin Pasian in Kha Siangtho tawh note hong kidimsak ding hi,’ a cihsa thu ka phawkkik hi

Eite in Topa Jesuh Khrih i up ciangin eite tungah hong piak mah bangin Pasian in hih Gentail mite tungah zong a kibangin a piakna teltakin kithei ahih manin, hih Pasian' nasepna a khaktanzo dingin kei kua ka hi hiam?” ci-in a gen hi
Amaute in hih thu a zak uh ciangin mawhsakna thu gen nawnlo uh a, “Gentail mite zong kisikin a nuntak theihna dingun Pasian in hunhoih pia hi,” ci-in Pasian a phat uh hi.
Stefen a kithah huna bawlsiatna hangin thu um mite tampi kithehthang uh hi. Mi pawlkhatte Foenisia gam, Saipras gam, leh Antiok khua ciangdong tung uh a, Jew mite kiang bekah Pasian' thu a hilh uh hi
Ahi zongin Saipras gammi leh Sairin khuami thu um mi pawlkhatte Antiok khua-ah pai uh a, Topa Jesuh hanga Lungdamna Thu, Gentail mite kiangah zong a gen uh hi
Topa in nakpi takin amaute huh ahih manin mi tampi in thu umin Topa lamah a kihei uh hi
Jerusalem-a om pawlpite in hih thu a zak uh ciangin Antiok khua-ah Barnabas a paisak uh hi
Barnabas a tun' ciangin Pasian in amaute thupha a piakna mu-in lungdam mahmah a, amaute citakin a lungsim khempeuh uh tawh Topa tungah a thumanna dingun a hanthawn hi
Barnabas pen mihoih mahmah, upna nei-in, Kha Siangtho tawh a kidim mi khat ahi hi. Mi tampi in Pasian a um uh hi
Tua ciangin Saul a zong dingin Barnabas pai a, Tarsas khua-ah a tung hi

Saul a muh ciangin Antiok khua-ah a paipih hi. Kum khat sung tawntung tua lai-a om pawlpi mite tawh amaute gel omkhawm uh a, mi tampi tak thu a hilh uh hi. Thu um mite pen Khristian ci-in min a kiphuah masakna mun in Antiok khua ahi hi
Tua hun pawl laitakin Jerusalem khua panin Antiok khua-ah kamsang pawlkhat paisuk uh hi

Amaute sung panin Agabas a kici kamsangpa hong ding a, leitung khempeuhah kialpi hong tung ding hi, ci-in Kha Siangtho sawlna tawh a genkhol hi. (Tua kialpi pen Klaudias in Gam uk Kumpi a sep laitakin a tung hi
Tua lai-a om thu um mite in amau hihzawh zah ciat hanciamin Judea gama om thu um mite kiangah huhna a puakna ding uh a vaihawm uh hi
Amaute in huhna ding sum a kaihkhop khit uh ciangin pawlpi upate tungah a na piak dingun Barnabas leh Saul a puasak uh hi.
